summary: EXP-467 (falsifiability-symmetry inline panel) was authored 2026-05-31T07:18:26Z by the prior analyst run but its tracker entry was not flipped to complete (note-of-record only mentioned EXP-464). Tracker now corrected. File is valid JSON with 3 patches against data/sections.json (part1 inline callout panel, part7 intro cross-link, part9 conclusions paragraph); see file for full details. Routing this issue-proposal because the decider scan would have missed the EXP without it. recommended_action=integrate.
